purpose: Reduce repeated AI onboarding token cost by replacing full-context preloads with a lightweight routing manifest and on-demand document loading.

token_hotspots_observed.source: C:/Users/Admin/Nutstore/1/Typora_save/自己的项目/jetson orin nx project_AI上下文.md
token_hotspots_observed.cost_reason: Long-term context is long and contains many historical milestones.
token_hotspots_observed.new_rule: Do not full-read by default. Read section headings first, then load only the current-stage sections, especially M42, 操作与复现指南, and 下一步计划 when device-side handoff or session closeout is the task.

token_hotspots_observed.cost_reason: Internal/reference folders include many long Markdown files. A broad EIS keyword scan can produce thousands of lines.
token_hotspots_observed.new_rule: Do not broad-read folders during startup. Use docs/knowledge_base/routing.md and .local_knowledge/internal_reference_index.md only after a real blocker or new technical domain appears.

token_hotspots_observed.source: README.md plus large docs under docs/
token_hotspots_observed.cost_reason: Project docs duplicate many conclusions for presentation, evidence, harness, and device-stage history.
token_hotspots_observed.new_rule: Read README current highlights plus the active contract first. Open detailed docs only when the active task references that exact doc.

token_hotspots_observed.source: results/ evidence summaries and review asset directories
token_hotspots_observed.cost_reason: Evidence directories contain many historical runs and generated artifacts.
token_hotspots_observed.new_rule: Use contract-declared evidence paths and targeted summaries. Do not enumerate all results unless verifying a missing path.

startup_sequence: Read C:/Users/Admin/Desktop/orin nx project/orin nx 项目口播模板.txt from the first line, including the rules section.
Run or read this manifest via: py -3.12 scripts/harness_runner.py onboard
Read AGENTS.md only for dispatch rules and safety boundaries.
Read the task-specific Done Contract before running or editing: currently configs/harness/contracts/local_warp_quality_bridge_loop_v1.json
Run harness static checks before experiments: doctor, check-claim, and JSON/schema checks as needed.

load_on_demand.trigger: Need exact project history or stale-state reconciliation
open: Select-String headings from the long-term context first
Only then open the relevant sections, currently M42, 当前项目结构, 操作与复现指南, 下一步计划

load_on_demand.trigger: Need EIS quality algorithm recovery after a scoped failed attempt
open: .local_knowledge/internal_reference_index.md if an internal source key is selected
At most two matched source documents before returning to a Done Contract
README.md current highlights and next direction sections
the exact evidence summary referenced by the active contract

load_on_demand.trigger: Need Nsight, NVTX, or final profiling evidence for the device-side stage

hard_rules: Do not load the full long-term context or full internal reference folders during default startup.
Do not copy internal original text, images, private links, or screenshots into public GitHub outputs.
Do not treat outdoor-car inverse/post_geometry results as Regular05 EIS-quality progress.
Do not claim full real-time EIS, zero-copy full chain, VPI optical-flow acceleration, or all-scene EIS quality until measured evidence supports it.
If the user has already reviewed and rejected a candidate, update stale pending-review contract/docs before running new experiments.
Keep generated reviewable videos under C:/Users/Admin/Videos/orin nx/review/<category>/<YYYYMMDD>_<loop_or_gate>/ with descriptive filenames.
